command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute 
-- Deletar todos os cupons de fidelidade do estabelecimento
DELETE FROM coupons WHERE code LIKE 'FID%';

-- Resetar o cartão de fidelidade do cliente
UPDATE loyaltyCards 
SET stamps = 0, totalStampsEarned = 0, couponsEarned = 0, activeCouponId = NULL, activeCouponIds = NULL
WHERE customerPhone LIKE '%999290000%';

-- Verificar o estado
SELECT id, customerPhone, stamps, totalStampsEarned, couponsEarned, activeCouponId, activeCouponIds 
FROM loyaltyCards 
WHERE customerPhone LIKE '%999290000%';
